chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Criminal Bail Application No.389 of 2026 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGEs 1. For orders on M.A. No.1985/2026 (U/A) 2. For orders on M.A. No.1986/2026 (Exp/A) 3. For hearing of bail application ------------------------- 04.02.2026 Syed Abad Hussain Shah, advocate a/w applicant ------------------------------------ Applicant/accused Syed Abbas Ali Shah son of Syed Chan Pir Shah seeks protective bail in FIR No.2351/2025, registered at P.S. Texila, District Rawalpindi, for offence under sections 324, 34, PPC. Learned counsel for applicant submits that there is family dispute between the parties, the applicant is maternal uncle of complainant Syed Bilal Haider Shah, he has been falsely implicated in this case due to mala fide intentions and ulterior motives, the applicant has nothing to do with the alleged offence; that he is a law abiding citizen and intends to surrender before the concerned Court but he apprehends his arrest at the hands of local police, hence he needs protection in order to enable him to appear before the concerned Court. Without touching the merits of the case, protective bail is granted to applicant/accused above named, for a period of seven days from today, subject to his furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.25,000/- (Rupees twenty five thousand) and P.R bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the Nazir of this Court. Applicant is directed to surrender before the concerned Court in the aforesaid period and join the trial forthwith. This order shall cease to have its effect after expiry of seven days from today or whenever the applicant surrenders before the concerned Court, which one occurs earlier.

Applicant is directed to surrender before the concerned Court in the aforesaid period and join the trial forthwith. This order shall cease to have its effect after expiry of seven days from today or whenever the applicant surrenders before the concerned Court, which one occurs earlier. The applicant is cautioned that this concession of protective bail will not be extended for any reason whatsoever and if he fails to surrender himself before the relevant Court during validity of this protective bail, his bail bond shall stand forfeited. Instant Criminal Bail Application stands disposed of in the foregoing terms. J U D G E Gulsher/PS
